subject: Rooftop pool structural load - additional equipment
question: Pool equipment schedule provided by Aqua Hospitality shows total wet weight of 48000 lbs for pool and surge tank. Structural drawings Level 5 are designed for 42000 lbs. Please provide revised structural calculations or confirm acceptable load or redesign support framing.

subject: Guest room mock-up comments - millwork reveals
question: Marriott brand review of guest room mock-up identified 6 items. Item 3 requires headboard wall panel reveal dimension to change from 3/4 inch to 1/2 inch to match brand standard. Confirm whether this is a design change or a correction to drawings and whether a change order is required.

subject: Ballroom operable wall pocket dimensions
question: Architectural drawing A-820 shows operable wall pocket at 24 inches width. Operable wall manufacturer requires minimum 30 inch pocket for the 40-foot wall system specified. Please revise drawings or select alternate wall system that fits 24 inch pocket.

subject: Spa HVAC dehumidification capacity
question: Mechanical engineer specified 3-ton dehumidification for spa wet area. Spa equipment vendor and Florida Building Code require minimum 5-ton dehumidification for pools and hot tubs in enclosed spaces per ASHRAE 62.1. Please confirm or revise mechanical design.

subject: Restaurant kitchen hood exhaust routing conflict
question: Kitchen exhaust duct from Level 1 restaurant conflicts with structural beam at Level 2 per BIM coordination. Structural drawings do not show a penetration and a non-penetration alternative would require a 28-foot horizontal run exceeding code maximum. Please provide solution.

subject: Exterior LED lighting specification - Miami-Dade NOA
question: Specification section 26 56 00 lists exterior LED fixtures that do not have a current Miami-Dade Notice of Acceptance. NOA required for all exterior fixtures per Florida Building Code for hurricane zone. Please provide NOA-compliant fixture alternatives or submit NOA for specified fixtures.

subject: FF&E coordination - guest room electrical outlets
question: Interior design drawings show 6 outlets in guest room headboard wall. Electrical drawings show 4 outlets at same location. Marriott brand standards require 8 outlets including USB-A and USB-C at bedside. Please confirm final outlet count and revise electrical drawings.
